title: liquidqc fragmentomics output (v1, Phase 2)
description: Per-sample JSON envelope emitted by `liquidqc rna`. Always-present envelope fields are required; the four Phase 2 fragmentomics blocks (fragment_length, end_motifs, soft_clips, periodicity) are optional and follow the schemas defined here. Later phases add per_chromosome, panels, sex_inference, snp_fingerprint, saturation, and cycle_quality. Companion sparse Parquet (`<sample_id>.per_gene.parquet`) holds Tier-2 + Tier-3 per-gene rows.

schema_version.description: Semver for this schema. `0.2.0-stub` covers Phase 2; subsequent phases bump again.

git_commit.description: Short git hash of the liquidqc build (or `unknown` for non-git builds).

sample_id.description: Sample identifier. Defaults to BAM basename without extension; overridable via `--sample-id`.

bam_path.description: Absolute path to the input BAM as supplied at run time.

bam_md5.description: MD5 of the BAM file bytes.

bam_size_bytes.description: Size of the BAM file in bytes.

gtf_path.description: Absolute path to the GTF annotation as supplied at run time.

reference_fasta_md5.description: MD5 of the reference FASTA. Null if `--fasta` was not supplied (end-motif fragmentomics unavailable).

library_prep.description: Free-text library prep label from `--library-prep`. Never silently defaulted; missing value is a hard error at the CLI layer. Used downstream to stratify cross-cohort analyses and to auto-flag tagmentation-driven end-motif bias.

paired_end.description: True if the BAM contains paired-end reads (auto-detected unless overridden via `--paired-end true|false`).

read_length_max.description: Maximum observed read length in this BAM.

read_length_mean.description: Mean observed read length in this BAM.

read_count_total.description: Total number of read records in the BAM (primary + secondary + supplementary + unmapped).

read_count_after_filters.description: Read count after `filters` (MAPQ, primary-only, proper-pair where requested) is applied.

filters.description: Filter parameters actually applied to this run. Keys are stable across schema versions; new keys may be added.

require_proper_pair.description: If true, only proper-pair reads (SAM flag 0x2) are counted toward QC and fragmentomics.

drop_secondary.description: If true, secondary alignments (SAM flag 0x100) are excluded.

drop_supplementary.description: If true, supplementary alignments (SAM flag 0x800) are excluded.

drop_duplicates.description: If true, reads flagged as duplicate (SAM flag 0x400) are excluded. cfRNA defaults to false because biological duplication is ~80%.

qc_flags.description: Auto-generated QC flags. The flag set evolves with the schema; current names are documented inline. Unknown values may appear in future schema versions.

runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds for the full liquidqc run on this BAM.

peak_rss_mb.description: Peak resident set size in MiB observed during the run.

fragment_length.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: fragment-length distribution from |TLEN| of proper pairs (one observation per pair). Absent on single-end input.

bins.description: Fragment-length histogram in eight named bins. Counts are integer pair observations.

mean.description: Mean |TLEN| in nt across observed pairs.

median.description: Median |TLEN| in nt across observed pairs.

total_pairs_observed.description: Number of proper pairs contributing to the histogram.

end_motifs.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: 5' and 3' fragment-end 4-mers from the reference FASTA (cleavage motifs). Absent if `--fasta` was not supplied (qc_flag `end_motifs_skipped_no_fasta` is emitted) or on single-end input. 5' motif: 4 ref bases starting at the leftmost coordinate of a proper pair, in fragment-strand orientation. 3' motif: 4 ref bases ending at the rightmost coordinate, reverse-complemented to fragment-strand orientation. Pairs where any of the eight bases is non-ACGT are dropped.

kmer_5p.description: 5'-end 4-mer counts. 256 keys (AAAA..TTTT). Values are integer pair counts.

kmer_3p.description: 3'-end 4-mer counts (in fragment-strand orientation, reverse-complemented from the reference). 256 keys.

shannon_entropy_5p.description: Shannon entropy (base 2) of the 5' 4-mer distribution. Max log2(256) = 8.

jensen_shannon_divergence_5p_vs_3p.description: Jensen-Shannon divergence (base 2) between 5' and 3' 4-mer distributions. 0 = identical, 1 = maximally different.

soft_clips.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: soft-clip 4-mers from read sequences (not reference). Counts split by clip end (5' vs 3' of the fragment) and by clip-length bin (1 nt, 2 nt, 3+ nt). 5'-clip / 3'-clip end semantics are orientation-corrected against the read strand. Per-end clip rates are over primary mapped reads.

kmer_5p_by_clip_len.description: 5'-clip 4-mer counts per clip-length bin (`len_1`, `len_2`, `len_3plus`). Values are 256-key 4-mer histograms.

periodicity.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: FFT-based periodicity of the |TLEN| histogram restricted to 50-500 nt (length 451, zero-padded to 512 for the transform). Power values are normalized to total_power (so they form fractions in [0, 1]) — multiply by total_power for raw spectral magnitudes. Absent on single-end input.
